description: Style noteThis kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty lookProduct detailsWhite kurta with purple and green floral print, has a round neck with a four button placket, short sleeves and split side seamsMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
